remaining_tasks.name: Add fee mode state to useCalculator and wire into calculateAll
Add Taker/Maker toggle buttons in TradeSetup

decisions.decision: SL auto-price toggle derives SL from percent, not live market price
decisions.rationale: Live price ≈ entry price → always invalid SL. Percent-derived price is always valid.

decisions.decision: Orchestrator useEffect deps narrowed to [currentPrice, autoPriceUpdate, tpAutoPriceUpdate]
decisions.rationale: Including handler functions (not useCallback) caused infinite render loop; handler functions are new refs every render.

decisions.decision: Position Sizing moved to right column above Profit Scenarios; Liquidation Analysis moved to bottom
decisions.rationale: User preference — keeps input-adjacent results together

next_action: Execute Phase 01.1 Plan 01 (01.1-01-PLAN.md): add entryFeeMode/tpFeeMode/slFeeMode/trailingFeeMode state to useCalculator, wire into calculateAll, then add 2×2 Taker/Maker grid in TradeSetup.
context_notes: Phase 01 (calculator-accuracy-ux-fixes) is fully complete with all 3 plans done.
